2603.29500.title: Learning to Generate Formally Verifiable Step-by-Step Logic Reasoning via Structured Formal Intermediaries
2603.29500.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated impressive performance on complex, multi-step reasoning tasks, especially when post-trained with outcome-rewarded reinforcement learning Guo et al. 2025. However, it has been observed that outcome rewards often overlook flawed intermediate steps, leading to unreliable reasoning steps even when final answers are correct. To address this unreliable reasoning, we propose PRoSFI (Process Reward over Structured Formal Intermediates), a novel reward method that enhances reasoning reliability without compromising accuracy. Instead of generating formal proofs directly, which is rarely accomplishable for a modest-sized (7B) model, the model outputs structured intermediate steps aligned with its natural language reasoning. Each step is then verified by a formal prover. Only fully validated reasoning chains receive high rewards. The integration of formal verification guides the model towards generating step-by-step machine-checkable proofs, thereby yielding more credible final answers. PRoSFI offers a simple and effective approach to training trustworthy reasoning models.
2603.29500.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）最近在複雜的多步推理任務上展現了令人印象深刻的表現，尤其是在經過以結果獎勵的強化學習後進行後訓練時 Guo et al. 2025。<lb/>然而，已觀察到結果獎勵常常忽略有缺陷的中間步驟，即使最終答案正確，也會導致推理步驟不可靠。<lb/>為了解決這種不可靠的推理，我們提出了PRoSFI（基於結構化形式中介的過程獎勵），這是一種新穎的獎勵方法，能在不妥協準確性的情況下增強推理的可靠性。<lb/>模型不是直接生成正式證明，這對於一個中等大小（7B）的模型來說幾乎無法實現，而是輸出與其自然語言推理對齊的結構化中間步驟。<lb/>然後，每一步都由正式證明者進行驗證。<lb/>只有完全驗證的推理鏈才能獲得高獎勵。<lb/>正式驗證的整合引導模型生成逐步可機器檢查的證明，從而產生更可信的最終答案。<lb/>PRoSFI提供了一種簡單而有效的方法來訓練可信的推理模型。
2603.29500.author: Luoxin Chen et.al.
2603.29500.authors: Luoxin Chen, Yichi Zhou, Huishuai Zhang
